suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update go-reliability guidance to explicitly exempt validator-only lint or cleanup follow-up features from the default 'write failing tests first' step when the feature contract requires the smallest possible non-behavioral fix.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The misc-reliability-service-fault-injection review reported that the feature contract required only removing the unused intString helper as the smallest possible lint fix, and the worker handoff marked followedProcedure=false solely because the go-reliability skill's default test-first step did not fit that validator-only cleanup scope.
